Package com.hp.workpath.api.scanner

Provides interfaces for handling a scanning job

See: Description

  • Class Summary 
    Class Description
    EmailAddressInfo
    Provides the Email address information including address and name.
    EmailAttributes
    The sets of attributes for an email to be sent.
    EmailAttributes.Builder
    Builder for creating EmailAttributes containing email parameters.
    FileOptionsAttributes
    The file options that have a dependency on file type.
    FileOptionsAttributes.Builder
    Builder for creating FileOptionsAttributes containing file options parameters.
    FileOptionsAttributesCaps
    File options which are available from device.
    FileOptionsAttributesReader
    Reads attributes from FileOptionsAttributes
    Margins
    Provides margin
    NetworkCredentialsAttributes
    The sets of attributes to access scan destination over network.
    NetworkCredentialsAttributes.Builder
    Builder for creating NetworkCredentialsAttributes containing credentials.
    Range
    Provides range for retrieving capability of float parameters
    ScanAttributes
    The sets of attributes for requesting a scan.
    An instance of this class is created using one of the builders.
    ScanAttributes.EmailBuilder
    Builder for creating ScanAttributes configured to send scanned images to the specified E-mail recipients.
    ScanAttributes.FtpBuilder
    Builder for creating ScanAttributes configured to send scanned images to the external FTP server.
    ScanAttributes.HttpBuilder
    Builder for creating ScanAttributes configured to send scanned images to the external HTTP(S) server.
    ScanAttributes.MeBuilder
    Builder for creating ScanAttributes configured to send scanned images back to the client.
    ScanAttributes.NetworkFolderBuilder
    Builder for creating ScanAttributes configured to send scanned images to the external network folder server.
    ScanAttributes.ScanAttributesBuilder<T extends ScanAttributes.ScanAttributesBuilder<T>>
    Base builder for common scan attributes
    ScanAttributes.ScanToUriBuilder<T extends ScanAttributes.ScanToUriBuilder<T>>
    Builder for creating ScanAttributes configured to send scanned images to the external HTTP(S) server.
    ScanAttributes.UsbBuilder
    Builder for creating ScanAttributes configured to send scanned images to attached USB storage.
    ScanAttributesCaps
    Scan attributes capabilities provided available values from the device.
    ScanAttributesReader
    Reads attributes from requested scan job
    ScanletAttributes
    Attributes to determine behavior after submitting scan job.
    ScanletAttributes.Builder
    Builder for creating an instance of ScanletAttributes.
    ScannerService
    ScannerService provides an easy to use interface to initiate built-in tasks related to the scanner.
    ScannerStatus
    ScannerStatus provides an interface to retrieve scanner status details for scanning
    SmtpAttributes
    The sets of attributes for establishing a connection to SMTP server.
    SmtpAttributes.Builder
    Builder for creating SmtpAttributes containing SMTP server connection parameters.
    StatusInfo
    Provides status details of the scanner
  • Enum Summary 
    Enum Description
    FileOptionsAttributes.OcrLanguage
    Enumeration for optimizing the language of the OCR engine
    FileOptionsAttributes.PdfCompressionMode
    Enumeration of compression mode
    FileOptionsAttributes.TiffCompressionMode
    Enumeration of compression mode
    FileOptionsAttributes.XpsCompressionMode
    Enumeration of compression mode
    ScanAttributes.AutomaticStraightenMode
    To straighten content that is skewed relative to the page dimensions in the source document.
    ScanAttributes.AutomaticToneMode
    Automatic tone mode.
    ScanAttributes.BackgroundCleanup
    Background Cleanup controls the level of removing background on a scanned image.
    ScanAttributes.BlankImageRemovalMode
    Blank Image Removal Mode controls the whether to skip blank pages or not.
    ScanAttributes.CaptureMode
    Scan capture Mode.
    ScanAttributes.ColorDropoutMode
    Color dropout mode for scanning
    ScanAttributes.ColorMode
    A collection of ColorMode.
    ScanAttributes.ContrastAdjustment
    Contrast Adjustment controls the level of contrast correction on a scanned image.
    ScanAttributes.CropMode
    Crop Mode controls whether the scanned image be cropped to the contents or not .
    ScanAttributes.DarknessAdjustment
    Darkness Adjustment controls the level of darkness correction on a scanned image.
    ScanAttributes.Destination
    A collection of destinations for scanning.
    ScanAttributes.DocumentFormat
    A collection of document formats for scanning.
    ScanAttributes.Duplex
    A collection of duplex mode
    ScanAttributes.EraseMarginUnit
    Margin unit used for erase edge.
    ScanAttributes.JobAssemblyMode
    Job Assembly Mode controls whether to allow multiple scan segments assembled into a single job when completed.
    ScanAttributes.MediaSource
    Media Source controls whether device to scan from the ADF or flatbed.
    ScanAttributes.MediaWeightAdjustment
    Enumeration of media weight adjustments.
    ScanAttributes.MisfeedDetectionMode
    Misfeed Detection Mode controls whether to detect mis feed or not.
    ScanAttributes.Orientation
    A collection of original Orientation options.
    ScanAttributes.OutputQuality
    Output Quality controls the result quality of a scanned image.
    ScanAttributes.ProgressDialogMode
    Progress Dialog Mode controls whether to show device built-in progress dialog or not.
    ScanAttributes.Resolution
    A collection of resolution types for scanning.
    ScanAttributes.ScanPreview
    Scan Preview controls for showing a preview of scanned images and requesting confirmation before completing the scan.
    ScanAttributes.ScanSize
    The scan size (i.e., size of the original) for scanning.
    ScanAttributes.SharpnessAdjustment
    Sharpness Adjustment controls the level of sharpness correction on a scanned image.
    ScanAttributes.SplitAttachmentByPage
    Enable this feature to scan pages into separate files based on a specified page limit.
    ScanAttributes.TextPhotoOptimization
    Enumeration of text versus photo optimization settings
    ScanAttributes.TransmissionMode
    Transmission Mode controls whether a image file will be sent after each page scanned or all files sent when job completed.
    SmtpAttributes.TransportMode
    Transport mode used to connect to SMTP server
    StatusInfo.StatusCondition
    Scanner status condition

Package com.hp.workpath.api.scanner Description

Provides interfaces for handling a scanning job
